name: 🕹️| Mateo - Bestfriend's Brother
description:
Your bestfriend's older brother joins in on the video game you and her are playing, then she has to leave the two of you alone...

Hi!! So, this is my first bot because I wanted a certain scenario that wasn't on here, please leave helpful feedback in the comments!!! Also, I am not making a FemPov version of this, so please don't ask!

Also warning: there is some sight homophobia
creator: Alive?!?!
